results.title: Best Multi Asset Allocation Mutual Funds to invest in India 2026
excerpts:
Section Title: Best Multi Asset Allocation Mutual Funds
Content:
Average Return
17.70%
No of Schemes
61
Multi asset allocation mutual funds invest in a minimum of three asset classes and aim to lower risks through proper diversification.
Multi asset allocation mutual funds are those investing in at least three asset classes, including debt, equities and commodities like gold. There has to be a minimum allocation of 10% to each of these asset classes, and these funds are tailored to lower risks through proper diversification. The aim here is to ensure balanced returns, and fund managers adjust allocations dynamically based on market conditions. This is done to leverage market opportunities and minimise overall volatility in turn.
 ... 
Section Title: Best Multi Asset Allocation Mutual Funds > ... > ICICI Prudential Multi Asset Fund Direct Growth
Content:
Fund Performance: The ICICI Prudential Multi Asset Fund has given 18.95% annualized returns in the past three years and 19.73% in the last 5 years. The ICICI Prudential Multi Asset Fund comes under the Hybrid category of ICICI Prudential Mutual Funds.
Minimum Investment Amount: The minimum amount required to invest in ICICI Prudential Multi Asset Fund via lump sum is ₹5,000 and via SIP is ₹100.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > ICICI Prudential Asset Allocator Fund (FOF) Direct Growth
Content:
Fund Performance: The ICICI Prudential Asset Allocator Fund has given 15.41% annualized returns in the past three years and 15.63% in the last 5 years. The ICICI Prudential Asset Allocator Fund comes under the Hybrid category of ICICI Prudential Mutual Funds.
Minimum Investment Amount: The minimum amount required to invest in ICICI Prudential Asset Allocator Fund via lump sum is ₹5,000 and via SIP is ₹1,000.

excerpts:
Section Title: 5 Leading Commodities Mutual Funds in India > \ SBI Gold Fund > \ ICICI Pru Commodities Fund
Content:
[ICICI Prudential Commodities Fund](https://www.personalfn.com/mutual-funds/best-funds/factsheet/icici-pru-commodities-fund-g-direct-plan?utm_source=the-fundstrategist&utm_medium=website&utm_campaign=e-letter&utm_content=the-fundstrategist) aims to generate long-term returns by investing in equity and equity-related securities of companies engaged in commodity and commodity-related sectors.
The fund is currently about 96.16% invested in equities and debt (0.15%), with the remaining held as cash and cash equivalents (3.7%).
Its portfolio is more balanced, with 36.32% invested in large caps, 34.17% in midcaps, and the remainder in smallcaps (29.51%).
